channel.title: FinCalc India Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on EMI, SIP, Tax, GST, Gold and smart money management for every Indian — Hinglish mein

item.title: New Income Tax Act 2025 — April 1 Se Kya Badla? Complete Guide 2026
item.description: April 1 2026 se Income Tax Act 1961 replace ho gaya naye Income Tax Act 2025 se. 19 key changes — tax year concept, HRA 4 nayi cities (Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Ahmedabad), ITR deadline August 31, Form 16 renamed to Form 130. Salaried Indians ke liye complete Hinglish guide.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: HRA Exemption 2026 — Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Ahmedabad Ko Mila 50% Benefit
item.description: April 1 2026 se 4 nayi cities mein 50% HRA exemption. Salaried professionals ka ₹25,000+ annual tax saving. New Income Tax Act 2025 ka salaried class pe direct impact — complete calculation guide.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: SGB 302% Return — Sovereign Gold Bond Redeem Karein Ya Hold Karein?
item.description: RBI ne ₹15,009 per unit redemption price fix ki. ₹1 lakh → ₹4.02 lakh in 6.5 years. Exit ya hold? Tax implications, reinvestment options aur expert verdict Hinglish mein.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: ₹12 Lakh Tax Free Income 2026 — Poori Calculation Aur Real Examples
item.description: Section 87A rebate ₹60,000 + Standard deduction ₹75,000 se ₹12L tak zero tax. Exact math with real examples. New tax regime mein kaun kitna bachayega — complete guide.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: ITR Filing 2026 — New Deadlines, New Forms, New Rules — Complete Guide
item.description: July 31 ya August 31? Form 16 ab Form 130. Kaunsa ITR form aapka hai? Documents checklist with step-by-step guide. New Income Tax Act 2025 ke baad ITR filing ka complete roadmap.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: Salary Slip Mein Kya Hota Hai 2026 — HRA, PF, TDS Sab Samjho
item.description: CTC vs in-hand, Basic, HRA, PF, TDS, Professional Tax — salary slip ka har component Hinglish mein explained. Fresher se senior tak — apni salary slip samajhna ab easy.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: Term Insurance Guide 2026 — ₹1 Crore Cover Kitne Mein Milega?
item.description: HDFC vs SBI vs LIC vs ICICI premium comparison. Claim settlement ratio, riders guide — age-wise complete analysis. ₹1 crore term plan 25 saal ki age mein sirf ₹8,000/year.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: Mutual Fund Types India 2026 — Equity, Debt, Hybrid, Index — Konsa Sahi Hai?
item.description: Beginners ke liye complete guide — Large Cap, Mid Cap, ELSS, Index Fund — risk, returns, tax sab compare. Apne goal ke hisaab se sahi mutual fund kaise choose karein.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: PPF Withdrawal Rules 2026 — Kab, Kitna Aur Kaise Nikaal Sakte Hain?
item.description: Partial withdrawal formula, premature closure conditions, loan facility, 15 year extension rules — complete PPF guide. PPF account se paise nikalna 2026 mein kitna easy ya mushkil.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: Gold vs Mutual Fund India 2026 — ₹1 Lakh Kahan Lagayein?
item.description: Gold +54% vs Nifty -10% — short term mein gold jeeta. But 10 saal mein kaun? Real data comparison. 2026 mein ₹1 lakh invest karna hai toh gold ya mutual fund — final answer.
item.author: satyam@satzzxzxx.me (Satyam Kumar)

item.title: PPF vs EPF vs NPS 2026: ₹1.5 Lakh Section 80C Ka Best Tax-Saving Investment — Complete Comparison
item.description: EPF rate 8.25%, PPF 7.1%, NPS equity 12-14% historical. Budget 2026: New tax regime ₹12L tax-free. Old vs new regime — 80C strategy. ELSS comparison. Complete guide for salaried, self-employed, NRIs. Section 80CCD(1B) extra ₹50K deduction guide included.

item.title: Crypto India 2026: Bitcoin 30% Tax, Digital Rupee, Legal Status — Complete Guide Hinglish Mein
item.description: India mein crypto ban nahi — lekin 30% flat tax, 1% TDS, 18% GST se effective tax 49%+ ho sakta hai. 44,000+ tax notices in 2025. Digital Rupee vs Bitcoin. FIU-IND registration mandatory from Jan 2026. Complete legal aur tax guide Hinglish mein.

item.title: Trump Tariff India Impact 2026: 26% Duty — IT, Pharma, Textile Exports, Rupee, Stock Market Complete Guide
item.description: US ne India pe 26% reciprocal tariff April 2026 mein lagaya. IT exports $60B at risk, pharma $8B, textile $4B. Rupee 94 pe, Nifty -8%. Complete sector-wise analysis Hinglish mein.

item.title: WB + Tamil Nadu Election Results May 4, 2026 — BJP vs TMC Economy Impact
item.description: West Bengal voting April 23 & 29, results May 4. TMC vs BJP — stock market, PSU, FMCG, infrastructure pe kya asar? Sector-wise impact Hinglish analysis.

item.title: India Investment Strategy Tariff War 2026 — Safe Haven Assets: Gold, FD, Debt Funds Complete Guide
item.description: Trump tariff war 2026 mein Indian investors ko kahan invest karna chahiye? Gold +54%, short-term FD 7%, liquid funds, defensive stocks — complete safe haven guide Hinglish mein.

item.title: IPL 2026 Economy & Stock Market Financial Impact — ₹15,000 Crore Cricket Economy Guide
item.description: IPL 2026 ka India ki economy pe kya asar? Media rights ₹48,390 crore, FMCG stocks, hospitality boom, fantasy sports economy — complete financial impact analysis Hinglish mein.

item.title: India-US Trade Deal 2026 — Common Man Pe Kya Asar? Jobs, iPhone Price, Petrol, Rupee
item.description: India-US bilateral trade deal July 2026 mein possible. 26% tariff reduce hoga — iPhone sasta, IT jobs safe, petrol indirect relief. Common man perspective se complete guide Hinglish mein.

item.title: Akshaya Tritiya 2026: Gold ₹1,48,000 Pe Kharidein Ya Nahi? Physical Gold vs ETF vs SGB — Complete Guide
item.description: 19 April Akshaya Tritiya hai. Gold 54% badha 1 saal mein — ₹96K se ₹1,48,260. ₹1 lakh mein sirf 6.7gm milega. Physical gold vs ETF vs SGB vs Digital gold comparison, muhurat timing, city prices, tax rules aur price forecast.

item.title: Iran War Ka India Pe Pura Impact 2026 — Oil ₹108, Petrol ₹120?, Rupee 94, LPG ₹912, Mehangai Guide
item.description: Iran-USA war 2026 ka India pe complete impact — crude oil $108, petrol price hike, rupee record low 93.94, LPG ₹60 up, Strait of Hormuz, stock market crash, EMI effect — sab kuch data ke saath.

item.title: Gold vs Mutual Fund India 2026 — 20 Saal ka Data, Tax, NRI Guide
item.description: Gold 11.2% CAGR vs Nifty 50 14.8% — real return comparison, tax rules, NRI guide, expert verdict.

item.title: CIBIL Score Guide 2026 — What It Is, How to Check & Improve Your Credit Score
item.description: Complete CIBIL score guide covering score ranges, interest rate impact, 7 improvement strategies, 6 myths busted, and free check methods for Indian borrowers.

item.title: ₹50 Lakh Home Loan EMI — SBI, HDFC, ICICI Comparison 2026
item.description: Complete EMI comparison with bank rates, prepayment savings, eligibility rules and tips for getting the lowest home loan rate in India.

item.title: GST Calculation Guide — Slabs, ITC, HSN Codes and Filing
item.description: Everything about GST rates, input tax credit, HSN/SAC codes, return filing dates and calculation methods explained.

item.title: SIP vs FD in 2026 — Where Should You Invest?
item.description: Returns comparison, risk analysis, tax treatment and smart allocation strategy for Indian investors.

item.title: Income Tax Guide 2026-27 — New vs Old Regime Complete Comparison
item.description: Complete comparison with slabs, deductions, charts and which regime saves you more tax.

item.title: FD Rates April 2026: SBI 6.8% vs Small Finance Banks 9% — Kahan Best Return Milega?
item.description: SBI FD rate 6.8%, HDFC 6.5%, Suryoday SFB 8.1%, Unity Bank 9% — April 2026 ke updated FD rates. DICGC insurance, senior citizen rates, tax rules aur best FD strategy guide.

item.title: India World's 3rd Largest Economy 2030 — Investment Roadmap: Kaunse Stocks, SIP, Sectors?
item.description: India #5 economy now to #3 by 2030. Davos session, Goldman 6.9% FY26, S&P BBB upgrade. Which sectors will grow most in next 4 years — complete investment roadmap.

item.title: Mehangai 2026 — Petrol ₹95, Medical 14%, Education 15% Up: Budget Kaise Bachayein?
item.description: India CPI 4.6% FY27, food inflation volatile 8%+, medical 14% yearly, education 15% yearly. Iran war LPG ₹912. 10 practical saving tips plus inflation-proof investment strategy.

item.title: NRI India Investment 2026 — NRE FD 7.5% Tax-Free, SGB, SIP, Real Estate Complete Guide
item.description: NRE FD 7.5% tax-free vs US savings 4.2%. NRI investors ke liye SGB, SIP, real estate, repatriation aur risk diversification ka practical 2026 guide.

item.title: RBI Repo Rate 5.25% Hold April 2026 — Aapki EMI Pe Kya Asar? Complete Guide
item.description: RBI ne April 2026 repo rate 5.25% par hold kiya. 125 bps cut ke baad home loan EMI savings aur next policy outlook ka clear borrower-focused analysis.

item.title: RBI Ka Naya Rule: UPI ₹10,000 Se Upar Transfer Pe 1 Hour Wait — Aapko Kya Karna Chahiye?
item.description: RBI proposal: ₹10,000 se upar new payee UPI transfer par 1-hour cooling period. Fraud prevention, daily usage impact, and practical do's and don'ts in simple Hinglish.

item.title: Real Estate India 2026: Tier-2 Cities 20% Return — Kahan Buy Karein?
item.description: Home loan rates 8.10% near 5-year low, tier-2 cities showing strong appreciation, and REIT alternatives. Buy vs rent decision framework with affordability data.

item.title: Rupee ₹93.94 Record Low 2026 — Petrol, iPhone, Education EMI Pe Kya Asar?
item.description: Rupee at record low impacts fuel, imports, foreign education EMI, travel and investments. Actionable household finance and portfolio protection steps for Indian users.

item.title: Term Insurance + Health Insurance 2026 — War, AI Job Loss: Ab Nahi Liya Toh Kabhi Nahi
item.description: Medical inflation 14% yearly and uncertain income cycles make insurance planning critical. Term plus health coverage, claim ratio checks, and ideal cover sizing explained.
